ingresar.descripcion: Take a photo of the label: the AI resolves the reagent and prefills the lot. You can also enter it manually.

mov.title: Movements
mov.desc: Traceability of entries, withdrawals, and adjustments recorded on lots.
mov.resumenSubtitulo: Stacked by type · interactive · exportable (SVG / PNG / CSV)

mesada.title: Bench
mesada.desc: Find a bottle by internal code and record consumption against that physical lot.
mesada.scannerIdle: Open the camera and point at the bottle QR.
mesada.scannerNoCamera: This browser does not allow camera access from the web.
mesada.errQrFormato: The scanned QR does not look like a valid internal lot code.
mesada.errCantidad: Quantity must be a valid number.

consumo.title: Consumption
consumo.desc: Automatic FIFO by default. You can also pin a lot by internal code.
consumo.sinStock: This reagent has no available stock.
consumo.scanInfo: This mode only deducts from the selected bottle. If you want multi-lot cascade, go back to FIFO.
consumo.modoFifo: automatic FIFO with multi-lot cascade if needed
consumo.msgCorresponde: Lot {{codigo}} belongs to {{nombre}}. Switched the selector to that reagent.
consumo.errCantidad: Quantity must be a valid number.

tareas.title: Tasks
tareas.desc: Operational tracking of tasks assigned to the team.

usuarios.title: Users
usuarios.desc: Onboarding and status of team accounts.
usuarios.errEstado: Could not change the user's status
usuarios.errPassword: The initial password must be at least 8 characters.
usuarios.formDesc: The initial password is required and a change is requested on first login.

proveedores.title: Suppliers
proveedores.desc: Catalog of suppliers and operational contacts for the lab.
proveedores.errEstado: Could not change the supplier's status
proveedores.sinContactos: This supplier has no contacts on file.
proveedores.formDesc: Add the general supplier; contacts are added from the detail panel.

dashboard.heroDesc: Active stock, upcoming expirations and the latest signed movements — updated with every lab action.
dashboard.quiebreTitulo: Low stock and days to stockout
dashboard.reposicionVacia: No suggested purchases with the current data.
dashboard.stockBajoSinConsumoDetalle: Stock {{stock}}/{{min}} {{unidad}}; no recent usage to estimate days
dashboard.reposicionTareaExistente: There is already an open task for this reagent.
dashboard.reposicionSilenciarTitulo: Remove from suggestions: this reagent is no longer used. It reappears on its own if it gets consumed again.
dashboard.reposicionTareaError: Could not create the replenishment task.

common.errConexion: Could not connect to the API at {{url}}. Make sure FastAPI is running and that VITE_API_URL points to the correct port.

login.subA: Sign in with your institutional credentials. Every action is
login.changeSub: Before continuing, set your own password for this account. Then you'll sign in again.
login.errLargo: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
login.errNoCoincide: The confirmation does not match the new password.
login.resetSub: Enter your institutional email. If an active account exists, we'll send a link valid for 15 minutes.
login.resetNewSub: Set a new password to recover access. The link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.

audit.title: Audit
audit.desc: Deterministic traceability for chain of custody by bottle or by reagent.
audit.errLote: Could not load the lot audit
audit.errReactivoCarga: Could not load the reagent audit
audit.limiteAviso: Showing the first {{n}} movements. Adjust the period or filters for more specific exports.

asistente.title: Assistant
asistente.desc: Query inventory or ask for technical guidance and protocols. It does not modify records.
asistente.notaFooter: The assistant only reads — it doesn't modify records. Double-check critical data.
asistente.msgPdf: I prepared a downloadable PDF with the assistant's last answer.
asistente.ej1: Which lots expire in the next 30 days?
asistente.ej2: How much ethanol do I have in stock?
asistente.ej4: Give me a reference protocol to prepare PBS 1X
asistente.ej5: How do I prepare PBS 1X using what I have in stock?

protocolos.title: Protocols
protocolos.desc: Calculate inputs, validate physical lots, and record deterministic protocol runs.
protocolos.calcularPrimero: Calculate a protocol to start the run.
protocolos.observacionesPh: Prepared for the cell culture room
protocolos.errStockInsuf: Some inputs do not have enough stock.
protocolos.validarTodos: Validate all required inputs before recording.
protocolos.calculadoraInfo: This calculator is informational and does not record stock movements.
protocolos.sinInsumosPlan: Could not reconstruct the planned inputs.
protocolos.sinMovimientos: No linked movements. This can happen with informational calculators or runs that do not deduct stock.
protocolos.plantillasDesc: Enable or disable editable protocol templates.
protocolos.msgCalculado: Inputs calculated. Validate the lots before recording the run.
protocolos.errQr: Could not read the QR image.
protocolos.errInsumoSinReactivo: {{nombre}} is not linked to a catalog reagent.
protocolos.errLoteOtroReactivo: The scanned lot belongs to {{reactivo}}, not to {{nombre}}.

equip.title: Equipment
equip.desc: Inventory of reusable instruments, operational status, and event history.
equip.seleccionarEquipo: Select an item from the table to see detail, record events, and history.
equip.errCantidadEntero: Quantity must be an integer greater than 0.
equip.fMotivoPh: e.g. Service, breakage, extra initial entry
equip.errCantInicialEntero: The initial quantity must be an integer greater than or equal to 0.
equip.errCostoNeg: The total cost cannot be negative.
equip.formDesc: If the initial quantity is greater than 0, an entry event is automatically recorded.
equip.errEtiquetasMax: Select up to {{n}} codes per PDF.
equip.errEtiquetas: Could not generate the codes PDF
equip.fUnidadCantidad: When a specific unit is selected, the event is recorded with quantity 1.

owner.title: Owner
owner.desc: Internal administration of organizations, modules, and initial users.
owner.slugPh: Generated from the name if left empty
owner.errPassword: The initial password must be at least 8 characters.
owner.iaSinEventos: No AI events for those filters.

reactivos.errStockMin: Minimum stock must be a valid number.
reactivos.editHelp: The reagent is the general concept. The base unit can be corrected only while there are no consumption or adjustment records; brand, supplier, manufacturer lot and cost are handled at the lot level.
reactivos.fusionarHelp: If {{nombre}} is loaded twice, choose the duplicate reagent: its lots move to this one and the duplicate is deactivated (soft delete, traceability preserved). Only reagents with the same unit ({{unidad}}) are listed; the merge can't be undone from here.
reactivos.sinOtrosUnidad: There are no other reagents with unit {{unidad}} to merge.
reactivos.errConsultarDup: Could not check duplicates. Try again or search manually below.
reactivos.sinDupClaros: The AI found no clear duplicates. Search manually below.
reactivos.buscarEnTodos: Or search across all with unit {{unidad}}
reactivos.confirmFusion: You'll move the lots from {{dup}} to {{sob}} and deactivate the duplicate. This can't be undone from here.

lotes.descripcion: Intake and control of active bottles per reagent.
lotes.errAbrirMov: Could not open the lot from movements
lotes.errBuscarLoteEtiqueta: Could not find that lot for labels
lotes.pendientesTitulo: Reagents without a lot or in transit
lotes.pendientesDesc: {{n}} reagent(s) worth reviewing to register arrival.
lotes.seleccionaParaEditar: Select a lot from the table to edit data, adjust stock or reprint labels.
lotes.cargaManualDesc: Manual entry. The unit is automatically converted to the reagent's base unit.
lotes.soloPendientes: Only out of stock or in transit
lotes.iaPrellenaDesc: The AI only prefills fields. Check the selected reagent and confirm before saving.
lotes.buscandoCatalogo: Searching the reagent in the catalog...
lotes.matchCoincide: Matches a reagent in the catalog
lotes.quedoSeleccionado: It's selected below. If it's not correct,
lotes.noEsEsteCrear: Not this one, create a new reagent
lotes.ambiguoElegi: I'm not sure which one it is. Choose one:
lotes.nuevoNoEncontrado: I couldn't find this reagent in the catalog. Fill in the data below and create it.
lotes.unidadBaseDesc: The base unit is permanent and drives FIFO. Minimum stock starts at 0 (you adjust it later).
lotes.unidadBaseInfo: Base unit: {{unidad}}. Registering as user ID {{id}}.
lotes.corregirUnidadBase: If the base unit is wrong, correct it before creating the lot.
lotes.primeroCrearReactivo: You first need to create at least one reagent.
lotes.errCantidad: Quantity must be a valid number.
lotes.errCantidadEnvases: Number of containers must be a valid number.
lotes.errCosto: Total cost must be a valid number.
lotes.errEnvasesEntero: Number of containers must be an integer greater than 0.
lotes.errNombreReactivo: The new reagent needs a name.
lotes.errUnidadReactivo: The new reagent needs a base unit.
lotes.errExtraer: Could not extract data from the label
lotes.imagenNoEtiqueta: The image doesn't look like a reagent label. You can enter the lot manually.
lotes.errPdfEtiquetas: Could not generate the labels PDF
lotes.metadataDesc: Metadata only. The current quantity is corrected with a stock adjustment and a reason.
lotes.stockActualInfo: Current stock: {{cantidad}} {{unidad}}. The adjustment records an auditable movement.
lotes.fMotivoPh: E.g.: Physical count, loss, evaporation, broken bottle
lotes.errCantidadReal: Actual quantity must be a valid number.
lotes.errMotivoObligatorio: A reason is required to adjust stock.
lotes.rolloUnaPorPagina: Roll: one label per page ({{ancho}}×{{alto}} mm).
lotes.errPosicionRango: The start position must be an integer between 1 and {{tope}}.
lotes.errEtiquetasMax: Select up to {{n}} labels per PDF.

cepario.title: Cepario
cepario.desc: Catalog of strains and parts with locatable physical stock.
cepario.detCaracterizacionVaciaSub: Add a record to log morphology, biochemical tests or resistances.
cepario.detSinViales: This entity has no vials yet.
cepario.faltaCaja: Choose a box from the inventory.
cepario.cajasVacias: No boxes in the inventory yet. Add them as equipment with the "Caja criogénica" category and they'll show up here.
cepario.cajasClickCelda: Tap an occupied cell to see the vial and strain.
cepario.celdasAyuda: One tube per cell. Edit to spread out (e.g. A1, A2, B7).
cepario.celdasSinSugerencia: Couldn't suggest cells; enter them manually.
cepario.celdasNoCoincide: You entered {{celdas}} cells for {{n}} vials: they must match.
cepario.movFaltaReactivo: Choose a reagent for the consumption.
cepario.movConsumoCantidadInvalida: The consumed quantity must be greater than 0.
cepario.faltaViales: The number of vials must be greater than 0.
cepario.etiquetasSinViales: This entity has no vials to label.
cepario.secVacia: This part doesn't have a sequence loaded yet.
cepario.secRangoInvalido: Invalid range: must satisfy 1 ≤ from ≤ to ≤ {{n}}.
cepario.secOmitidas: {{n}} GenBank feature(s) were skipped for having an unsupported location (join/order or crossing the origin).
cepario.secFeaturesVacias: No features. Add one or import a GenBank.
cepario.secSeleccionHint: Drag on the map to select a region (fills “from–to” to copy it)
cepario.secConfirmarQuitar: Remove the sequence and all its features?
cepario.secEnzimasNinguno: No sites for the common enzymes.
cepario.caracFirmadaInfo: Signed — immutable. Corrections go as an amendment.
cepario.caracScoreHint: Assistance: computed from the ideal profile. Review and confirm.
cepario.promoverSinGrupo: Set the operative group (H/U/P/M) before promoting.
cepario.confirmarArchivar: Archive this isolate? It stays searchable and reactivable.
cepario.bacdiveAlertaBslConflicto: Review biosafety: BacDive reports {{bacdive}}, local record {{local}}.
cepario.bacdiveAlertaPatogenicidadSinBsl: Review biosafety: BacDive reports pathogenicity ({{tipos}}) and the local record has no BSL.
cepario.bacdiveAlertaPatogenicidadBslBajo: Review biosafety: BacDive reports pathogenicity ({{tipos}}) and the local record is {{local}}.
cepario.bacdiveAlertaTypeStrainSinDesignacion: Review designation: BacDive marks type strain {{designacion}} and the local record has no clear designation.
